report.summary: Researched and built two new learn guides: Smart Wallets Guide 2026 (practical comparison of ERC-4337/EIP-7702 implementations) and MEV Protection Guide (actionable defense strategies against sandwich attacks), both added to PUBLISH_QUEUE

sections.title: Research Brief
items: Account Abstraction & Smart Wallets: 40M+ smart accounts deployed, 132M+ UserOperations processed, Coinbase Smart Wallet hit 1M+ users with 270K new accounts in single day
EIP-7702 shipped May 7, 2025 with Pectra upgrade — enables EOAs to execute smart contract functionality without migration
Bundler market concentration: Pimlico 28%, Stackup 26%, Alchemy 24% — top 3 control 78%
Paymaster penetration at 99.2% of ERC-4337 transactions, $5.7M+ gas sponsored
MEV: $686M+ cumulative on Ethereum, 51% from sandwich attacks, 90%+ blocks through MEV-Boost
Relay concentration: bloXroute Labs controls 45.6% of all Ethereum relay traffic
Solana MEV: Jito 95%+ dominance, ~$1.5B annual extraction
ePBS (Enshrined PBS) targeting H1 2026 Glamsterdam upgrade to reduce MEV at protocol level
Shutter Network encrypted mempools live on Gnosis Chain, Ethereum integration in development

sections.title: Content Created
items: Smart Wallets Guide 2026 (~3,000 words, 12 min read) — practical guide comparing ERC-4337 vs EIP-7702, top 6 implementations (Coinbase Smart Wallet, Safe, Alchemy Account Kit, Biconomy, ZeroDev, Pimlico), key features (gas sponsorship, session keys, social recovery, passkeys, batching), decision framework by use case, security risks including $905.4M smart contract losses in 2025

MEV Protection Guide (~3,000 words, 11 min read) — user-focused actionable guide covering private transaction pools (Flashbots Protect, MEV Blocker), MEV-aware DEXs (CoW Protocol, 1inch Fusion, Shutter Network), smart trading habits (slippage settings, trade splitting, off-peak timing, L2 trading), cross-chain MEV strategies (Ethereum, Solana/Jito, L2s), upcoming ePBS changes

sections.title: SEO Optimization
items: smart-wallets-guide-2026: Title 'Best Smart Wallets in 2026 — ERC-4337, EIP-7702 & How to Choose | degen0x' (71 chars), targets 'smart wallets 2026', 'ERC-4337 wallets', 'best smart wallet'
mev-protection-guide: Title 'MEV Protection Guide (2026) — Avoid Sandwich Attacks & Frontrunning | degen0x' (73 chars), targets 'MEV protection', 'avoid sandwich attacks', 'frontrunning protection'
Both pages include 5 FAQs targeting People Also Ask queries, 5 related article internal links, structured TOC with anchor links
Both pages added to PUBLISH_QUEUE in published-pages.ts
